clean_control_retention.claim_boundary: Observed tracking proximity and receiver-ball co-movement after reception only; no pass quality, individual technique grade, decision value, intent, causation, or tactical optimality claim.

outcome_sequence.claim_boundary: Measured observable ball outcome after reception only; no quality, intent, causation, possession-control, or decision-value claim.

possession_retention.claim_boundary: Raw provider possession is not used to back the product control claim; clean control is evaluated from observed tracking proximity and receiver-ball co-movement.
